item.description:
Release v4.18.0

Changes since v4.17.0

  • docs: add LumiCoreKit/LumiChatKit layered architecture refactor proposal
  • docs(editor-chat): add README and .gitignore for EditorChatPlugin
  • feat: add ConversationTurnDurationPlugin for chat toolbar
  • feat: add GoalTaskPlugin for goal-oriented task management
  • feat: add turn finished hook for GoalTaskPlugin auto-continuation
  • feat: Enhance GoalTask prompt system and sidebar display logic
  • feat: register GoalTaskPlugin in plugin registry
  • feat(auto-task): add user perspective to continuation prompts
  • feat(core): add onTurnFinished hook for plugins
  • feat(editor-chat): add EditorChatPlugin for sending code references to chat
  • feat(editor): add auto-save modes and improve save workflow
  • feat(LumiCoreKit): add LumiProviderState for provider/model selection and availability runtime state
  • feat(memory): encourage proactive memory saving via prompt improvements
  • feat(plugin): Add pluginAboutView protocol hook for plugin about page
  • feat(plugins): fix aboutView method name and add comprehensive AboutViews
  • fix: add missing defaultBottomTabID static constant in LumiLayoutState
  • fix: add missing EditorKernel import in EditorFileService
  • fix: correct MiniMax video query task API endpoint path
  • fix: improve logging for debugging sidebar reload issues
  • fix(ask-user): guard against missing options for multi-choice questions
